data.title: Enterprise Blockchain Shifts to Hybrid Models for Compliance and Efficiency
data.description:
Catenaa, Saturday, April 12, 2025- Enterprise blockchain is entering a new era, with a growing focus on hybrid solutions that balance the benefits of public and private networks. These hybrid models, which separate critical data handling from public record-keeping, allow companies to comply with diverse global regulatory frameworks while utilizing the transparency and security of […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/enterprise-blockchain-shifts-to-hybrid-models-for-compliance-and-efficiency

data.title: Ripple Acquires Hidden Road to Expand Financial Services
data.description:
Catenaa, Saturday, April 12, 2025-Ripple has announced the acquisition of prime brokerage firm Hidden Road for $1. 25 billion, marking a significant step in its strategy to bridge traditional finance with decentralized finance. This deal makes Ripple the first cryptocurrency company to own and operate a global, multi-asset prime broker. Hidden Road, which clears over $3 […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/ripple-acquires-prime-broker-hidden-road-for-1-25b-to-expand-financial-services

data.title: Over Half of Crypto Holders in Singapore Use Digital Currencies for Payments
data.description:
Catenaa, Saturday, April 12, 2025-More than half of cryptocurrency holders in Singapore use their digital assets for everyday transactions, according to a recent report by Straits Times. The study, published on April 8, 2025, revealed that 52% of crypto owners in Singapore have already used cryptocurrencies for payments, while 67% intend to do so in […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/over-half-of-crypto-holders-in-singapore-use-digital-currencies-for-payments

data.title: Mitsubishi UFJ Set to Launch Japan’s First Fiat-Pegged Stablecoin
data.description:
Catenaa, Saturday, April 12, 2025- Mitsubishi UFJ Trust and Banking, a subsidiary of Japan’s largest financial group, is on the verge of launching the nation’s first fiat-pegged stablecoin. Reports from Yomiuri Shimbun and CoinPost confirm that the development of the stablecoin was completed by the end of 2024, with final adjustments now underway. The stablecoin […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/mitsubishi-ufj-set-to-launch-japans-first-fiat-pegged-stablecoin

data.description:

data.title: Ethena Labs launches USDe reserve proof and will publish proof results once a week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ethena Labs announced the launch of USDe reserve proof, which was created and launched in cooperation with Harris & Trotter, Chaos Labs, LlamaRisk and Chainlink. USDe reserve proof will publish proof results once a week, which will be independently reviewed by the aforementioned verifiers, and the data sources include blockchain, custodians and exchange partners. In addition, reserve fund assets are not included in the US dollar value of USDe's supporting assets.

data.title: Bitget launches VIP regular airdrop plan, the first project is PROMPT
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget officially launched the "VIP Airdrop Ceremony", which is open to VIP3 and above users. Users only need to complete the registration, without additional tasks, to unlock the regular new coin airdrop.
The first airdrop project is PROMPT, with a total prize pool of 150,000 pieces, and the event time is from 20:00 on April 11 to 20:00 on April 18 (UTC+8). Before the end of the event, registered users must maintain VIP3 and above to unlock the current airdrop rewards.

data.title: DWF Labs received another 5 million USD1 9 hours ago, becoming the top 2 institution holding USD1 on the chain
data.description: On-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa monitored that DWF Labs has become the top 2 institution holding USD1 on the chain launched by WLFI, and currently holds 6 million USD1. After receiving 1 million stablecoins on April 3, DWF Labs received another 5 million USD1 on the BSC network 9 hours ago, and then crossed the chain to the Ethereum mainnet. In addition, Wintermute should be the top 1 institution holding USD1 on the chain. Currently, the four addresses hold a total of 57 million USD1, which is 9.5 times the size of DWF Labs' holdings.

data.title: Yesterday, Bitcoin spot ETF had a net outflow of $1 million, and Ethereum ETF had a net outflow of $29.2 million
data.description: According to Farside Investors' monitoring, the US Bitcoin spot ETF had a net outflow of US$1 million yesterday; the US Ethereum spot ETF had a net outflow of US$29.2 million.
